title: Bridge Essay: Cognition Without Neural Representation: Dynamics of a Complex System.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, embedded, enactive, extended mind; critique of computationalism.

**Cognition Without Neural Representation: Dynamics of a Complex System.**. Front Psychol.. PMID: 35095629. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2021.643276. This paper proposes an account of neurocognitive activity without leveraging the notion of neural representation. Neural representation is aconcept that results from assuming that the properties of the models used in computational cognitive neuroscience (e.g., information, representation, etc.) must literally exist the system being modelled (e.g., the brain).
